ruleName: 绩效奖励成本项数据波动分析规则
description: 用于分析绩效奖励成本项数据波动的任务拆解规则

taskTemplates.descriptionTemplate: 查询最近3天的绩效奖励用户数据，按运行状态、业务日期和来源分组统计
taskTemplates.queryTemplate: SELECT run_status_ext1, business_day, source, count(run_status_ext1), sum(expense_cost) sum, min(create_time) minCt, max(create_time) maxCt, max(ts) FROM performance_reward_user WHERE business_day >= {{business_day}} and source in ({{source}}) GROUP BY run_status_ext1, business_day, source order by business_day

taskTemplates.descriptionTemplate: 查询指定用户的信息，使用前一天的业务日期
taskTemplates.queryTemplate: select * from user_info where erp = {{erp}} and business_day = {{business_day}}
